name: prinner-two-voice
description: The two-voice galant Prinner (Gjerdingen): the upper voice descends scale degrees 6-5-4-3 over a 4-3-2-1 bass, the two voices moving together (homorhythmic). Degree-relative, so it matches in any key; lines are register-ordered high→low and the matcher pairs any two co-onset single-pitch voices by register (not by label). This is the full schema that data/patterns/prinner-descent.json (melody domain) could only half-express — its own docstring flagged the two-voice pairing as needing exactly this cross-voice scope.
